name: Lobster Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Cornstarch, dissolved in 2 tbsp Cold chicken broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the coarsely ground pork in 2 tablespoons of peanut oil.
2. Add the remaining sauce ingredients: fermented black beans, garlic, ginger, scallions, soy sauce, rice wine, sherry, sugar, salt, and chicken broth.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil.
4. Stir in the dissolved cornstarch mixture to lightly thicken the sauce.
5. Turn off the heat.
6. Stir in the beaten egg, using chopsticks to pull the egg into thin strands as it cooks.
7. The recipe makes 3 cups.
